baseline.parameter_rule: nearest great-circle station at each target coordinate; ties by collection then par id

burns.derivation: development burns inherited from A9c3; confirmation burn i is the first 64 SHA-256 bits of a9d-successor-development-confirmation-v1/burn/i reduced modulo 2^31-1

confirmation.consume_rule: target bytes may be downloaded and hashed by the custodian before sealing but may not be parsed or summarized until the sealed manifest, exact candidate fit, objectives, thresholds, burns, and terminal rule are hash-bound

final_rule.mandatory_availability: at least two of three stations in every retained objective/stratum cell; grouped storm descriptors use all finite contributors at actual event frequency
final_rule.priority_improvement: at least two priority families materially improve at both 30 and 100 years

development.calibration: inherit exact A9c3 candidate-blind thresholds and storm component scales

fit_recipe_amendment.amount: multiply every body/tail amount component by one deterministic station-month factor so the fitted positive-amount mean matches the coefficient-fit observed mean
fit_recipe_amendment.latent_occurrence: apply one station-month logit offset to state wet probabilities so the stationary time-weighted wet probability matches coefficient-fit observed wet frequency
fit_recipe_amendment.renewal_occurrence: exponentially tilt wet and dry duration PMFs in opposite directions so their stationary wet fraction matches coefficient-fit observed wet frequency
fit_recipe_amendment.status: prospective development tuning within the two frozen model classes

development.monthly_reconciliation: A9c3 analytic-versus-heldout deterministic check after calibration

evidence_surface.acceptance: prospectively accept A9c4's 92 retained cells with explicit limits; do not require every family in every originally applicable dry-transition stratum
scope_limits: wet_amount absent in arid_boundary, hot_arid, and monsoonal_transition
compound_context absent in arid_boundary, hot_arid, and monsoonal_transition
some occurrence/wet-amount cells absent as enumerated by the mask

hypotheses.rule: the accepted 92-cell surface is preserved exactly at both horizons and all 19 exclusions remain report-only
all corrected event context output has structural physical support without clipping or repair
both candidate classes retain a valid fresh fit, pass monthly calibration/reconciliation, and remain structurally non-isomorphic
the unchanged selector seals at most one development candidate after rejecting hard failure, retained-cell incompleteness, and any material degradation
confirmation target bytes are not scientifically accessed unless one complete candidate and confirmation manifest are sealed
if a candidate seals, the one-shot confirmation returns exactly one registered pass/final-failure terminal without feedback into tuning
